rows.pm_rationale: Quality fundamentals intact (EPS 2.85, operating_margin 35.4%, FCF 51.6B, debt-to-equity 0.019) but valuation expensive (PE 33.62, PB 38.70, EV/EBITDA 25.38). Stock recovered +3.81% 5d, +8.24% 20d; no selloff to exploit. Macro Moderately Restrictive (stress_score=2) caps equity allocation 40%, demands strict quality/valuation discipline. Network-effect evidence absent (alt-data not wired v1). Narrative catalyst unknown (20 news items post-cutoff). No ADaS history yet. Recommend WATCH pending Agent 03 narrative-price-gap assessment and alt-data wiring to verify franchise durability. No position at current valuation in restrictive regime.

AAPL passes fundamental hard gates (EPS 2.85, operating_margin 35.37%, D/E 0.0188) but fails valuation gate (PE 33.62, PB 38.70 expensive in Moderately Restrictive regime). Network-effect evidence absent (alt-data not wired). Narrative catalyst insufficient (news unavailable, 20 items post-cutoff). No veto tripped; soft-gate failures preclude buy entry. Recommend WATCH pending alt-data wiring, valuation reassessment, and next earnings (2026-07-30) confirmation.

AAPL passes hard fundamental gates (EPS 2.85, op_margin 35.4%, FCF 51.6B) but fails valuation gate (PE 33.62, PB 38.70, EV/EBITDA 25.38 = expensive). Macro regime Normal/Moderately Restrictive enforces strict equity discipline. Network-effect evidence absent (alt-data not wired). Narrative catalyst unknown (news empty post-cutoff). Risk agent issued advisory (no hard-veto) but insufficient evidence for long entry sizing. Recommend no_trade pending valuation reset and alt-data verification.

AAPL passes hard fundamental gates (EPS 2.85, operating_margin 35.4%, debt-to-equity 0.019, FCF 51.6B) but faces valuation headwinds (PE 33.62 elevated, PB 38.70 premium) in Moderately Restrictive macro regime (CPI 3.29%, policy rate 3.64%, equity_cap 40%). Upstream agents split: Narrative (no catalyst, high uncertainty), Alt-Data (needs_more_evidence), Fundamental (supports_long), Network-Effect (absent), Valuation (expensive), Quality-Long (watch), Risk (no veto). Evidence gaps (alt-data, sentiment/ownership, news, information-integrity) prevent full thesis validation. ADaS prior-day disagreement (6 of 7 agents dissenting, std_proxy 0.6389) reinforces caution. Decision: WATCH pending macro stabilization, alt-data verification, and upstream agent verdicts. If macro stabilizes and alt-data confirms franchise health, escalate to BUY at 2-3% initial (max 5.0%).
